lesson.menu_title: The Floor Is Yours -- Expressing Opinions and Ideas
lesson.menu_desc: Share opinions and ideas with opinion frames and hedging -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- The Floor Is Yours -- Expressing Opinions and Ideas
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Diogo Leal | Aula 8 -- The Floor Is Yours

listenings.text: Hi Diogo, this is Sophia. In tomorrow's discussion, we want to hear your opinion on the new tool. From my perspective, it could save time, but I am not fully sure. Please consider the costs and the training, and prepare two or three points. If you tend to agree, say why. If you slightly disagree, that is fine too. Just explain your perspective clearly. I would suggest you keep it short and simple. Perhaps we could decide together at the end. Thank you, and see you tomorrow.

Thank you. May I share my opinion? In my opinion, the new tool is a good idea. From my perspective, it will save us time on reports. I tend to agree with Sophia on the cost, but I am slightly worried about the training. So I would suggest a small pilot first. Perhaps we could test it with one team for a month. If the results are good, I propose we offer it to everyone. That is my view. I am happy to hear other opinions.

extra_audio.text: Diogo asks to share his opinion. He gives his view that the team should run a pilot. Sophia says a pilot might be slow. They agree to test with only one team. Finally, they propose to decide together after the pilot.
